title: Designer Skill Brand Profile
description: Brand identity contract — colors, typography, voice, and constraints. The designer skill reads this to lock visual + verbal consistency across generated assets for a project.

name.description: Project / app name as it should appear in copy

tagline.description: Single-sentence positioning used in App Store / hero copy

primary_deep.description: Darker brand color for text-background contrast (used when primary fails WCAG)

ink_dark.description: Primary text color in light mode

ink_soft.description: Secondary text color in light mode

surface.description: Card / surface background in light mode

ink_dark_dm.description: Primary text color in dark mode

tone.description: 1-2 sentence voice guide. Imagine you're briefing a copywriter.

do_not.description: Forbidden claims, regulatory red lines, brand-conflict colors, etc.

style_anti_references.description: Things to look NOTHING like (e.g. ['stock photo of senior couple in wheat field'])

illustration_style.description: Free-text style description used in every illustration prompt. E.g., 'flat geometric, 2-color, generous whitespace'

icon_style.description: Used in every icon prompt. E.g., 'rounded line icons, 2px stroke, brand teal fill, slightly playful'

audience.description: Primary audience description, used to age- and culturally-tune generated content

platform_targets.description: Which platforms ship assets (affects icon family generation, screenshot dimensions)

voiceover_default_voice_id.description: ElevenLabs voice ID used by gen-voiceover.mjs when --voice-id is omitted

presenter.description: Default on-brand presenter description, e.g. 'warm female audiologist, 40s, approachable'

azure.description: Defaults for the Azure AI Speech TTS-Avatar engine (gen-avatar.mjs --engine azure)

default_style.description: Default musical brief, e.g. 'calm ambient piano, hopeful, unobtrusive'

output_root.description: Where generated assets land relative to project root
